basic_details.job_title: RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank (RNSB) has officially announced the Jr Executive Recruitment 2026 with vacancies (number of posts not specified). The notification was published on the rnsb.bank.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 30 years and hold First Class Graduate (Except Arts) or Postgraduate (Except Arts) qualification can now submit their online applications from 16 May 2026 to 23 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 18-04-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 25-04-2026

age_limit.details: Maximum Age limit: 30 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.details: Jr.Executive (Trainee) | Qualification: First Class Graduate (Except Arts) OR Postgraduate (Except Arts).2 year course. Experience: 2 years’ experience in any Co-Operative bank or any financial institute is preferable. Candidate Should be well versed with Computer knowledge (Freshers may apply)

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply online for RNSB Apprentice 2026 by following these steps:
Register with your email ID and mobile number
Fill in the application form with correct details
Submit the application and take a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. What is RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank (RNSB) has invited online applications for the post of Jr Executive (Trainee) at its Gandhinagar location for eligible graduates and postgraduates (except Arts) for the 2026 recruitment cycle.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name and location under this notification?
faq.answer: The current opening is for the post of Jr.Executive (Trainee) and the position is based at Gandhinagar, as per the notification details.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are announced for RNSB Jr Executive 2026?
faq.answer: The exact number of Jr Executive (Trainee) vacancies has not been mentioned in the notification; candidates are advised to refer to the official current openings page for any updates.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for RNSB Jr Executive?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class Graduate (Except Arts) or a Postgraduate (Except Arts) degree, generally for a 2-year course, from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. Is work experience mandatory for the Jr Executive post?
faq.answer: Two years’ experience in any Co-operative bank or any financial institute is preferable, but freshers can also apply, provided they meet the educational and age criteria.

faq.question: Q6. What computer skills are required for RNSB Jr Executive?
faq.answer: Candidates should be well versed with basic computer knowledge, as the bank expects Jr Executives to be comfortable working on computer-based systems.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for RNSB Jr Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Jr Executive (Trainee) post is 30 years, with relaxation applicable as per the rules mentioned by the bank.
